title: Ryuma's/Zoro's Shusui from One Piece
description: This texturepack contans the Katana shusui from One Piece
body:
to get Suisui name a netherite Sword : **shusui**

to get Suisui in the scabbard name a netherite Sword : **shusui scabbard**

![Anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f330c1a655cfb82634196382afbd94ac593554.gif)


you will need optifne(forge) or CIT Resewn(fabric) to let it work
